ddls:
CREATE TABLE "faculty_members" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the faculty member is associated */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position held by the faculty member */,
  "field_of_specialization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field of specialization of the faculty member */,
  "research_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research group the faculty member belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Birth date of the faculty member */,
  "highest_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree earned by the faculty member */,
  "highest_degree_institution" TEXT /* Institution where the faculty member earned their highest degree */,
  "highest_degree_year" INTEGER /* Year the faculty member earned their highest degree */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member was hired */,
  "tenure_status" INTEGER /* Tenure status of the faculty member */,
  "tenure_date" TEXT /* Date the faculty member received tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_members_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_members_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_members_research_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_group_id") REFERENCES research_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_members_field_of_specialization_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_of_specialization_id") REFERENCES fields_of_specialization ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school or graduate school where the department belongs */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member who is the department head */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school or graduate school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school or graduate school */,
  "dean_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dean of the school or graduate school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "school_description" TEXT /* Description of the school or graduate school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_dean_id FOREIGN KEY ("dean_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Associate Professor, Professor) */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the position (e.g., 1 for Assistant Professor, 2 for Associate Professor, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields_of_specialization" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field of specialization */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field of specialization (e.g., Food Analysis, Plant Genetics) */,
  "field_description" TEXT /* Description of the field of specialization */,
  "field_code" TEXT /* Code for the field of specialization (e.g., 'FOOD ANALYSIS') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the research group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the research group */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member leading the research group */,
  "group_website" TEXT /* Website of the research group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_groups_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member teaching the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "course_credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "course_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course being offered */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the course is offered */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication appeared */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member who authored the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member who is an author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Total funding amount for the project */,
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of funding */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the principal investigator of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_funding_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_source_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "funding_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source (e.g., National Science Foundation, University Research Fund) */,
  "funding_description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding allocation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project receiving the funding */,
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the funding source providing the funding */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date of the funding allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_allocations_funding_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_allocations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project involved in the collaboration */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborating institution */,
  "institution_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the collaborating institution */,
  "collaborator_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_email" TEXT /* Email of the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic milestone */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member achieving the milestone */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone (e.g., Tenure, Promotion) */,
  "milestone_date" TEXT /* Date of the milestone */,
  "milestone_description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_milestones_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_advising" (
  "advising_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advising relationship */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member doing the advising */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student being advised */,
  "program" TEXT /* Academic program of the student */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the advising relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the advising relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advising_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advising_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advising_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Academic program of the student */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the student's program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)
